posts.name: Rohan M.
posts.text: Just finished my 4th consecutive all-nighter for exams and I genuinely don't know how much longer I can keep this up. The pressure of maintaining a 9+ CGPA while also dealing with family expectations feels absolutely crushing sometimes. Anyone else feel like they're running on fumes? 😔

posts.name: Anonymous
posts.text: PSA for everyone comparing themselves to topper students on the class group: their highlight reel is not your behind-the-scenes. You don't see their breakdowns at 3am. Stop comparing. Focus on YOUR journey. 💪

posts.name: Sneha K.
posts.text: 💡 Tip that saved my life during finals: The Pomodoro technique + a no-phone box. 25 min deep work, 5 min pure break (no scrolling). After 4 cycles, take 20 min. My anxiety dropped 60% in just 2 weeks. Sharing is caring! 🌿
